creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-11-24 05:20:16 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/p5-Net-Dropbox-API Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The Dropbox API is a OAuth based API. I try to abstract as much away
  as possible so you should not need to know too much about it.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-Dropbox-API/
  
  PR:             ports/152406
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2289    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/net/p5-Net-Dropbox-API/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-Dropbox-API/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-Dropbox-API/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/net/p5-Net-Dropbox-API/pkg-plist (new)
